name: Pina Colada Fruit Dip
recipeIngredient: 8 oz crushed pineapple in its own juice, can/undrained
3 1/2 oz package instant coconut pudding and pie filling
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor bowl with metal blade or blender container, combine all ingredients.
2. Cover; process for 30 seconds.
3. Refrigerate for several hours or overnight to blend flavors.
4. Serve with fresh fruit.
5. Makes 2 1/2 cups. I usually serve it in a pineapple that has been split lengthwise and hollowed out.
Another good dip is simply caramel ice cream topping. Serve with sliced apples in the Fall, which is really a nice treat.
